CustomField.description: The warehouse linking code follows the format CCRMNNNN, where CC is the city code (e.g., CH for Chennai, BL for Bangalore), R denotes the region (S–South, N–North, W–West, E–East, C–Central), M is a constant indicating a manufacturing link, and NNNN is a 4-digit sequence number (0001–0015). Both the production and storage warehouses in the same city share the same linking code.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The warehouse linking code follows the format CCRMNNNN, where CC is the city code (e.g., CH for Chennai, BL for Bangalore), R denotes the region (S–South, N–North, W–West, E–East, C–Central), M is a constant indicating a manufacturing link, and NNNN is a 4-digit sequence number (0001–0015). Both the production and storage warehouses in the same city share the same linking code.
CustomField.label: Warehouse Linking Code
